headline.purpose: Page title in the header. One per view.

body.purpose: Default text and form values; prose caps at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase letter-spaced monospace for kickers, table headers, chart titles.

data.purpose: Tabular monospace for ASN, email, handle, timestamp, score, count.

shadows.name: resting-lift
shadows.purpose: Near-invisible lift on panels and the active tab chip.

shadows.name: overlay-pop
shadows.purpose: Modals only; the one place real elevation is allowed.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions; exponential ease-out, no bounce.

motion.name: duration-default
motion.purpose: Standard transition duration for hover, focus, and reveal.

breakpoints.name: compact
breakpoints.purpose: Two-column lookup layout collapses to one column; toolbars stack.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single loud action per context (run lookup, save settings, start discovery).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--accent); color: var(--on-accent); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--r-sm); padding: 12px 16px; font: 600 0.8125rem/1.2 var(--sans); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-strong); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0.5px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet utility actions (refresh, export, logout). A ghost with a hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: var(--surface); color: var(--ink-soft); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: var(--r-sm); padding: 12px 16px; font: 600 0.8125rem/1.2 var(--sans); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--surface-hover); color: var(--ink); border-color: var(--ink-faint); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Success Button
components.description: Reserved for committing imported data (import selected contacts / leads).
components.css: .ds-btn-success { background: var(--positive); color: var(--on-accent); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--r-sm); padding: 12px 16px; font: 600 0.8125rem/1.2 var(--sans); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-success:hover { background: var(--positive-ink); } .ds-btn-success:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Segmented Tabs
components.description: Primary view navigation as a single inset toolbar; the active tab is a raised chip.
components.html: <nav class="ds-tabs"><button class="ds-tab ds-tab-active">ASN 查询</button><button class="ds-tab">AI 线索发现</button><button class="ds-tab">联系人列表</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; padding: 3px; background: var(--surface-sunk); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: var(--r-md); } .ds-tab { background: transparent; color: var(--ink-soft); border: 0; border-radius: var(--r-sm); padding: 8px 16px; font: 550 0.8125rem var(--sans); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-tab:hover { background: var(--surface-hover); color: var(--ink); } .ds-tab-active { background: var(--surface); color: var(--accent-ink); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.28 0.03 256 / 0.06); } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Role Chip
components.description: A machine-token tag (abuse, technical, noc); monospace, petrol-tinted.
components.css: .ds-chip-role { display: inline-block; padding: 1px 8px; border-radius: var(--r-xs); background: var(--accent-tint); border: 1px solid var(--accent-line); color: var(--accent-ink); font: 500 0.75rem var(--mono); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Follow-up / send status with a leading dot, so status is never carried by color alone.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--positive-tint); color: var(--positive-ink); border: 1px solid oklch(0.86 0.05 155); font: 600 0.75rem var(--sans); } .ds-badge-dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 999px; background: currentColor; opacity: 0.85; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Search and form field; surface fill, hairline stroke, petrol focus ring.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="组织 / 姓名 / 邮箱">
components.css: .ds-input { background: var(--surface); color: var(--ink); border: 1px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: var(--r-sm); padding: 8px 12px; font: 0.875rem var(--sans); transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--ink-faint); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-tint-2); }

components.name: Panel
components.description: The base container: warm surface, 12px corners, defined by a hairline not a shadow.
components.html:
查询结果

3 个 ASN · 2 条邮箱 · 1 条异常
components.css: .ds-panel { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: var(--r-lg); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.28 0.03 256 / 0.06); padding: 20px; } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font: 650 1.125rem var(--sans); letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--ink); } .ds-panel-sub { margin: 0; font: 0.8125rem var(--sans); color: var(--ink-muted); }

components.name: Readout Strip
components.description: Signature stats display: one bordered bar divided by hairlines, large monospace tabular numbers. The antidote to the hero-metric dashboard.
components.html:
128联系人总数
41已发邮件
23有意向
components.css: .ds-readout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1px; background: var(--line); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: var(--r-md); overflow: hidden; } .ds-readout-cell { background: var(--surface); padding: 16px 20px; } .ds-readout-cell strong { display: block; font: 600 1.75rem var(--mono); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--ink); } .ds-readout-cell span { display: block; margin-top: 4px; font: 0.75rem var(--sans); color: var(--ink-muted); }

narrative.overview: The interface of a precision instrument resting on engineering paper. The operator works network-infrastructure contacts (ASNs, ARIN role emails, peering desks), reading dense tables in daylight for long stretches. The system makes that reading exact and trustworthy: calm, engineered, an instrument and not a toy. Two tensions carry the look: warm paper surfaces against cool blue-grey ink, and human prose in a humanist sans against machine data in tabular monospace. It explicitly rejects the generic blue-and-white B2B SaaS template; if a stranger could guess the palette from the category alone, the design has failed.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper surfaces, cool ink text, one committed petrol accent.
Machine data in tabular monospace; human language in a humanist sans.
Hairline borders over shadows. Flat at rest, dense by intent.
A restrained, low-chroma status palette where every color maps to a real state.
Honest interaction states everywhere: hover, focus, disabled, empty, error.

rules.name: The One Petrol Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one accent hue. Petrol marks what is actionable or active and nothing else. If two accents appear on a screen, one is wrong.

rules.name: The Warm-and-Cool Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are tinted warm (hue ~88), ink is tinted cool (hue ~256). This tension is load-bearing. Never flatten both to a neutral grey, and never invert it.

rules.name: The No-Pure Rule
rules.body: Never #fff and never #000. Every neutral is tinted toward paper or ink.

rules.name: The Machine-Data-Is-Monospace Rule
rules.body: Any value a machine produced (ASN, email, handle, ID, timestamp, count, score) is monospace with tabular figures. Any value a human wrote is sans. This is how the operator trusts the columns.

rules.name: The Engraved-Label Rule
rules.body: Structural labels (kickers, table headers, chart titles) are small, uppercase, letter-spaced monospace, like markings stamped into an instrument panel.

rules.name: The Hairline-First Rule
rules.body: Reach for a 1px line before a shadow. If a box needs definition, give it a border. Only two shadows exist.

rules.name: The Flat-2014-Test
rules.body: If a card looks like a 2014 app, the shadow is too dark and the radius too round. Pull the shadow toward zero and the corner toward 6-12px.

dos: Do keep exactly one accent: petrol oklch(0.48 0.088 222) for actions, links, active state, focus.
Do set every machine identifier (ASN, email, handle, timestamp, score, count) in tabular monospace.
Do define surfaces with 1px warm hairlines; reach for a border before a shadow.
Do tint every neutral, warm for surfaces (hue ~88), cool for ink (hue ~256).
Do pair every status color with a dot or text label, so status never relies on color alone.
Do give each interactive element honest hover, focus, disabled, empty, and error states.
Do keep the status palette low-chroma and semantic: moss = positive, ochre = pending, clay = danger.
donts: Don't introduce stock Tailwind blue (#2563eb) or any second accent. The category reflex is blue; refuse it.
Don't use pure-white floating cards, soft drop-shadow haze, or pastel badge soup.
Don't build a hero-metric dashboard. Use the Readout Strip instead.
Don't use #fff or #000; every neutral is tinted toward paper or ink.
Don't add consumer-playful gradients, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't color non-destructive actions red; only true deletions are clay-red.
Don't nest cards, round corners past 12px, or let any interface read as 'AI made this dashboard.'
